releases.name: v0.1.22
releases.body:
## `v0.1.22` (February 7, 2026)

> https://www.omnibox.pro/docs/zh-cn/change-log#v0.1.22

**Web**

1. Added support for commercial features
2. Added display of personal and team storage usage
3. Added right-click context menu support for "Personal" and "Team"
4. Fixed issue where share expiration time could be set to a past time
5. Fixed issue where share page title didn't follow the file title
6. Improved display when share link has expired
7. Added support for resizing sidebar by dragging left/right on shared pages
8. Added welcome message on shared pages when AI chat is enabled
9. Optimized icons on share pages
10. Fixed issue where settings page appeared empty after binding Google/WeChat and returning to homepage

**Browser Extension**

1. Improved display in some error scenarios
2. Fixed several known issues

**Website**

1. Added [Pricing](https://www.omnibox.pro/en/pricing/) page - choose a plan that suits you

**Other**

1. Released Xiaohei OmniBox [Series 1](https://w.url.cn/s/AQAnLvC) and [Series 2 (Spring Festival)](https://w.url.cn/s/AIvVXC7) sticker packs on WeChat
2. Added [WeChat Red Packet Cover](https://support.weixin.qq.com/cgi-bin/mmsupport-bin/showredpacket?receiveuri=NU_wTjSBRZZt2G&check_type=2#wechat_redirect)
3. Added [OmniBox Community](https://www.omnibox.pro/community/) (currently in beta — welcome to join the community to discuss and exchange ideas about product-related topics)

## What's Changed
* release(v0.1.22): Sync submodules by @LucienShui in https://github.com/import-ai/omnibox/pull/113


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/import-ai/omnibox/compare/v0.1.21...v0.1.22

readme_html:
OmniBox - 小黑

English | 简体中文

Docs

OmniBox Docs

Introduction

OmniBox (小黑) is a simple, cross-platform, all-in-one AI knowledge hub. All you need to do is collect, then ask.

Core Features

  1. Save the main content of a webpage to OmniBox via the browser extension.
  2. Upload and end-to-end parsing & indexing for files in formats like PDF, Word, PPT, MP3, etc.
  3. Markdown editing and rendering (formulas, mind maps, flowcharts, sequence diagrams, Gantt charts, music notation, etc.)
  4. Q&A and writing based on both Internet and local databases.
  5. Flash: Quick capture of fleeting ideas on iOS with support for voice recordings and text notes.
  6. Share: Seamless file sharing to OmniBox directly from iOS.
  7. WeChat Bot: Save files, webpages, videos, voice messages, text, and chat records to OmniBox anytime, anywhere via WeChat.
  8. User and team system, permissions, sharing management, multi-tenancy, multi-language, dark mode, mobile responsiveness, and more.

Quick Start

Welcome to our online service: omnibox.pro, supporting login via Email, Google and WeChat.

Browser Extension

Browser Extension Installation | OmniBox Docs

Deployment

Local Deployment

Local Development

git clone --recurse-submodules https://github.com/import-ai/omnibox.git
cd omnibox
cp example.env .env
bash scripts/dev.sh up -d --build

Roadmap

  • Agent, folder, and document public sharing
  • WeChat Bot
  • Open API
  • WeChat Mini Program
  • RSS Subscription

Star History
